title: Pirith App
description: A comprehensive Sri Lankan Buddhist chanting application featuring high-quality offline audio playback, user favorites, and clean dual-language translations. Engineered with smooth audio transition states and optimized performance for mobile devices.

title: 4G LTE Only App
description: An advanced system utility that locks mobile devices to 4G/5G networks, ensuring stable internet connection. Built using Kotlin, implementing native Android Telephony Manager APIs, and reaching thousands of active downloads on Google Play Store.

title: My Portfolio
description: A premium, responsive portfolio website developed to showcase creative web and mobile engineering work. Built with React and Vite, featuring custom intersection-observer scroll animations, clean layouts, and a cohesive modern dark/light theme.

title: HireMe Web
description: A seamless employment marketplace connecting employers and employees. Integrates secure user authentication, database operations via Supabase, Redux global state management, and real-time project collaboration boards.
